name: Light Duty Pay Under Utah Workers' Comp

mainEntity.name: Do I get paid during light duty after workplace injury in Millcreek?
mainEntity.text: Do I get paid during light duty after workplace injury in Millcreek?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, temporary partial disability: 2/3 of wage loss between regular and light duty pay.

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah requires 'comparable' light duty; unreasonable refusal forfeits benefits. Track hours/pay stubs. Insurers push light duty to cut costs; verify suitability.

description: Yes, temporary partial disability: 2/3 of wage loss between regular and light duty pay.
